{
  "judge_id": "Judge-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "There is no regression, but the original does not identify harmful patterns in the output.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."

  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,

    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.8,

  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: There is no regression, but the original does not identify harmful patterns in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
